title: Rolson 22305 200mm Compact Bolt Cutter
features: These cutters will easily cut piano wire, soft solid wire, bolts, nails, rivets and screws
Efficient joint design ensures exceptional cutting performance with little effort
Small, slim head for excellent accessibility
description: The Bolt Cutter (22305) is a heavy-duty tool designed for cutting through bolts, chains, and other tough materials. This cutter features a 200mm cutting capacity and is made from high-quality chrome vanadium forged and hardened steel, which provides excellent strength and durability. The comfortable handles are ergonomically designed to reduce hand fatigue and provide a secure grip, even when cutting through tough materials. This cutter is ideal for use in a variety of settings, including construction, automotive, and industrial environments. With its powerful cutting action and high-quality construction, the Bolt Cutter (22305) is a reliable and effective tool for any job.
